channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Iran Live Updates: US Strikes in Iran 'Completed,' CENTCOM Says
item.description: President Donald Trump announced 'major combat operations' against Iran on Feb. 28, with massive joint U.S.-Israeli strikes.

item.title: Mass shooting in Johannesburg settlement leaves 12 dead, 9 wounded
item.description: Police said a manhunt is ongoing for more than 10 suspects.

item.title: Karmelo Anthony gets 35 years for killing Austin Metcalf
item.description: Anthony was convicted earlier Tuesday after a trial that examined the confrontation leading to Metcalf's death at a Frisco track meet.

item.title: Untrained girl wows with handpan talent in Germany
item.description: ABC News' Danny New profiles an 11-year-old German girl whose handpan performances are gaining attention on streaming platforms.
